reviews.review_title: A Great short story in VR from Toei
reviews.review_description:
I am just super happy to see Toei making stuff for the Oculus Quest, this one is a short story with characters that appear to be from a tabletop experience, its short but well acted and worth experiencing. I really hope this is the start of a lot more stuff coming from the company to VR, they have a massive catalog of franchises that would be perfect for VR.

Featured in Oculus Quest Seated Games Video - https://youtu.be/Naxha7wgbDQ
